changes.reason: The -527 charm_pin_pullback_long tail occurred with rolling-high distance 14.75; the current 6-point ceiling excludes it from the already profile-scoped charm-pin tail box. Expanding only this charm-pin veto boundary tests the known near-miss without broad ES structure pruning.
The same charm-pin tail had pullback-from-high 9.75, outside the current 4.5 ceiling. Raising the ceiling lets the veto cover the extended rejection/recovery pattern seen in the worst charm-pin row.

Current max VWAP acceleration is 0, while the bad charm-pin row had negative acceleration and remains eligible. Keeping this at 0 preserves the weak/negative acceleration requirement and avoids widening into clean positive-acceleration continuation winners.

Keep the tail guard scoped to mid/high setup-quality charm-pin entries rather than low-quality generic pullbacks; the worst charm-pin row had setup quality 61.99, so 60 captures it while avoiding a broad low-quality veto.

expected_effect: Should reduce charm_pin_pullback_long tail heat, specifically targeting the -527 MAE extended rejection row, with minimal impact on pullback_long, 1DTE, and no-0DTE routing. Tradeoff is possible loss of a few profitable charm-pin recoveries; reject if total PnL drops below 98% of run_001 or charm-pin profile PnL retention falls below 90%.
label: charm-pin-tail-box-nudge
rationale: Use one surgical-veto family, not another take-profit or call-wall expansion. Prior charm-pin tail-risk activation was the only accepted recent hypothesis, improving score and net profit without trade starvation. The latest diagnostic shows charm_pin_pullback_long remains profitable and fast, but its worst tail is a near-box miss caused by rolling-high and pullback ceilings, so the next test should widen that profile-scoped tail box rather than globally tightening structure or extended-VWAP gates.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long produced 34 VALID_0DTE trades, $1236.70 PnL, 164.53 PnL/exposure hour, and 5.3 minute median hold, but one extended/rejected entry produced -527 MAE with rolling-high distance 14.75, pullback-from-high 9.75, ADX 17.95, and setup quality 61.99.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Pin Tail Box Refinement
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Some extended charm-pin recoveries are profitable; if the widened box blocks too many fast winners, score and profile PnL will fall despite lower MAE.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE charm_pin_pullback_long entries with high VWAP extension/rejection, large rolling-high distance, large pullback-from-high, weak or negative VWAP acceleration, and mid/high setup quality.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE improves from -527 toward <= -375, profile PnL retained >=90%, total net profit retained >=98% of run_001, and completed trades down no more than 5.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: The sample is an unusually favorable long-only momentum/pullback tape: 97 completed trades, 100% win rate, no slow >=12h trades, drawdown around 0.5%, and strong fast-trade cont...

new_strategy_ideas.name: Runtime Heat Containment Layer
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Worst MAE improves toward <= -527 with net profit >=98% of leader and no material realized loss introduction.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Dormant Pin-Avoid Holdout Activation
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Activated dormant profile positive over at least 5 trades, average MAE better than active-profile median, and total score not below leader.
